title: Junior Python Developer
description: We are looking for a junior Python developer with at least 1 year of experience. The candidate must know Python and Git. Knowledge of Django and REST APIs is a plus.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: We need a full stack engineer with strong JavaScript skills, experience with React on the frontend and Node.js on the backend, and solid SQL knowledge. TypeScript, Docker, and AWS experience are bonuses.

title: Senior ML Engineer
description: Seeking a senior ML engineer with deep expertise in Python, PyTorch, and production ML systems. Must have MLOps experience. Kubernetes, Spark, LLM fine-tuning, and CUDA knowledge are highly valued.

title: Associate Product Manager
description: Entry-level product manager to assist in product development. Must have basic product strategy knowledge and strong communication skills.

title: Product Manager
description: Product manager to define product vision, prioritize features, and work with engineering teams. Must have strong analytical and communication skills.

title: Senior Product Manager
description: Senior product manager to lead product initiatives, mentor junior PMs, and drive strategic decisions. Technical background preferred.

title: Marketing Coordinator
description: Entry-level marketing coordinator to manage social media and create content. Must be creative and detail-oriented.

title: Marketing Manager
description: Marketing manager to develop and execute marketing campaigns, analyze performance, and drive growth.

title: Head of Marketing
description: Head of marketing to lead marketing team, develop strategy, and drive company growth. Must have proven track record of scaling marketing operations.

title: Sales Manager
description: Sales manager to lead sales team, manage pipeline, and drive revenue growth. Must have strong negotiation and relationship-building skills.

title: HR Manager
description: HR manager to oversee recruitment, employee relations, and HR operations. Must have strong interpersonal and organizational skills.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Financial analyst to perform financial modeling, analysis, and reporting. Must have strong Excel and analytical skills.

title: UX Designer
description: UX designer to create user-centered designs, conduct research, and collaborate with product and engineering teams.

title: Data Analyst
description: Data analyst to analyze data, create dashboards, and provide insights to drive business decisions.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: DevOps engineer to build and maintain infrastructure, automate deployments, and ensure system reliability.
